about-trust-surface.block:
Why Trust CommodityNode?

Editorial Transparency
  • Every commodity hub clearly labels whether its pricing is based on direct futures, a proxy asset, or analysis-only coverage.
  • We separate market data freshness from editorial publication dates so readers can tell what was updated automatically versus what was reviewed by the editorial layer.
  • We publish methodology, corrections, contact details, and commercial limitations publicly rather than hiding them in fine print.
  • When a feed is unreliable because of rollover, scale breaks, or proxy limitations, we prefer showing unavailable status over publishing false precision.
Transparent Methodology

Every impact score and correlation is calculated from historical data with documented logic. We show our work.

No Conflict of Interest

We don't manage money, run a fund, or receive payments to cover specific commodities. Analysis is independent.

Clear Caveats

Every forecast includes confidence ranges. Every signal states its historical win rate and time horizon. Not financial advice.

Living Documentation

Methodology evolves as we improve models. Version history is tracked and major changes are disclosed in posts.

Read the full Methodology →

Corrections & Review Policy

  • Corrections: Material factual or numerical errors are corrected on-page as soon as verified.
  • Review standard: High-traffic pages, flagship commodity hubs, and monetized surfaces receive the most frequent review and QA attention.
  • Data exceptions: If a live feed becomes unreliable because of contract rollovers, frozen upstream series, or proxy distortions, we may suppress the daily change figure until a safer value is available.
  • Commercial separation: Advertising and subscriptions support the site, but they do not determine which commodities or companies are covered.

contact-transparency-surface.block:
Editorial & Commercial Transparency

  • CommodityNode publishes independent analysis and does not accept payment for favorable commodity or company coverage.
  • Advertising and subscriptions support the site, but sponsored research is not mixed into core market analysis.
  • If a data feed is unstable, rollover-distorted, or proxy-limited, we may suppress the daily change value rather than display a misleading number.

Enterprise & Team Access

Looking for team seats, API access, custom data exports, or a dedicated onboarding call? We offer enterprise plans starting at $149/month for up to 5 seats.

Email us at enterprise [at] commoditynode [dot] com with:

  • Your team size and primary use case
  • Which commodity sectors matter most to your work
  • Preferred onboarding timeline

Learn more about Enterprise →

methodology-limitations-surface.block:
Transparency & Limitations

Historical Backtesting Bias

Correlation coefficients and sensitivity betas are calculated from historical data and may not reflect future relationships, particularly during structural breaks or regime changes.

Proxy Symbol Limitations

26 of our 60 commodity hubs use ETF or equity proxies rather than direct futures prices. These proxies introduce basis risk and may not perfectly track the underlying commodity. All proxy hubs display a "Proxy" badge.

Not Financial Advice

All content on CommodityNode is for informational and educational purposes only. Signal Reports and forecasts are analytical tools, not investment recommendations. Always conduct your own due diligence.

Data Freshness

Price data is updated daily via automated scripts. AI forecasts are recalculated weekly. Correlation matrices refresh on a 30/60/90-day rolling basis. All data displays its last-updated timestamp.
